rows.label: tev001195_MSG0001
rows.name: ......[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001195_MSG0002
rows.name: Oh, hello, [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001195_MSG0003
rows.name:
Sorry about that. I was
just lost in thought.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001195_MSG0004
rows.name:
Or maybe it's more accurate to say
that I was getting a bit sentimental.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001195_MSG0005
rows.name:
When exactly did this place become my
home? When did I grow to love it so?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001195_MSG0006
rows.name:
So many unexpected things
have happened, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001195_MSG0007
rows.name:
And yet, humanity has begun to lay down
roots on this planet in spite of it all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001195_MSG0008
rows.name:
I don't know. Maybe that's why I feel like
my perceptions have changed a little.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001195_MSG0009
rows.name:
When I finish a mission and
return to the Home, it really
feels like I'm coming home.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001195_JNK0010
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev001195_SEL0011
rows.name: Tell Elma you feel the same way.

rows.label: tev001195_JNK0020
rows.name: Disagree

rows.label: tev001195_SEL0021
rows.name: Say you don't feel that way at all.

rows.label: tev001195_MSG0010
rows.name: It makes me happy to hear that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001195_MSG0011
rows.name:
Interesting. Is that because you
miss your home back on Earth?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001195_MSG0012
rows.name:
Or am I the strange one for getting
sentimental over what amounts to a
simple military housing facility?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001195_MSG0013
rows.name:
...No, that's not fair.
They're more than that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001195_MSG0014
rows.name:
Did you know that our floor is
unique within the BLADE Home?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001195_MSG0015
rows.name:
Our quarters are larger than those
of the other teams, and also come
with the biggest kitchen.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001195_MSG0016
rows.name:
I've been blessed to be able to share them
only with people I trust completely.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001195_MSG0017
rows.name:
Nagi and Vandham even allowed me to
bring Lin and Tatsu in here, despite
her age and his... Well, him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001195_MSG0018
rows.name:
It was good of them to
make all that happen.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001195_JNK0030
rows.name: Speculate

rows.label: tev001195_SEL0031
rows.name:
Assume that it's due to
her rank as a colonel.

rows.label: tev001195_JNK0040
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev001195_SEL0041
rows.name:
Ask why Elma was given
such special treatment.

rows.label: tev001195_MSG0019
rows.name: Hah. No, I'm afraid that's not it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001195_MSG0020
rows.name:
BLADE has no ranks—not in a practical kind
of way, I mean. The only people who really
care that I'm a colonel are Iriina and Gwin.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001195_MSG0021
rows.name:
Think about it—would you and Lin really want
to live under the same roof as someone you
had to address as "colonel" all the time?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001195_MSG0022
rows.name: No, rank means nothing here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001195_MSG0023
rows.name:
Anyway, if we have another opportunity
someday, I might tell you more
about it. ...And about me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001195_MSG0024
rows.name:
But for now, we should drop it.
I know you're busy enough without
me taking up all your time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001195_MSG0025
rows.name: That's actually a bit...tricky.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001195_MSG0026
rows.name:
Perhaps once we've secured the
Central Life, I can take the time
to do the explanation justice.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001195_MSG0027
rows.name:
Besides, this is no time to
reminisce about the past.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001195_MSG0028
rows.name:
I know you have missions
of your own to pursue.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001195_MSG0029
rows.name:
Now let's both get out
there and do our best.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001195_MSG0030
rows.name:
I assume you know why I get
"special treatment" now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001195_MSG0031
rows.name:
It's because my true nature has to be
concealed from the general public.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001195_MSG0032
rows.name:
True, I'm using a Blue Blood like
everyone else, so the odds of my
being discovered are quite low.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001195_MSG0033
rows.name:
However, my knowledge of Earth culture
and customs isn't exactly...flawless.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001195_MSG0034
rows.name:
While my appearance is unlikely to
betray me, my lack of knowledge
and experience very well could.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001195_MSG0035
rows.name:
That's why I was allowed to form a team
composed only of those I trusted.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001195_MSG0036
rows.name:
Not to say I don't trust Iriina—I
just knew her talents could be
put to better use elsewhere.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001195_MSG0037
rows.name:
Well, that's enough about
me. We should get going.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001195_MSG0038
rows.name:
After all, we've both got a great deal
to accomplish for the good of NLA.[ST:wait ]
